creator: pch-freebsd-bugs-1@u-1.phicoh.com
text:
pkg upgrade tries to install sndio 1.7.0 (on 12.2). This fails with:

[1/16] Installing sndio-1.7.0...
===> Creating groups.
Using existing group '_sndio'.
===> Creating users
Creating user '_sndio' with uid '702'.
pw: user '_sndio' disappeared during update
pkg: PRE-INSTALL script failed
